[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized anime-style person is shown holding chopsticks near their face while a red arrow and a circled face graphic point toward the lower right.

The main subject is a young-looking anime-style person with short dark hair, wearing a light blue collared shirt. They face slightly left of the camera, with their head tilted and their mouth area partly obscured by their hand, as they hold a pair of chopsticks with one hand near their mouth. A red arrow overlays the image pointing toward the person’s face area, and a large white circle with a simple black-and-white smiling face icon appears in the lower right.

The setting appears to be indoors with a bluish background featuring a window grid or panel lines behind the person. The lighting is even and bright, with a cool color palette dominated by blues and grays.

Visual details include the person’s dark eyes, pale skin tone, and hair with layered strands. The person’s shirt collar is visible, and their posture shows them leaning forward slightly. The red arrow is thick and prominent, pointing diagonally toward the head area. The smiling face icon is contained within a white circle bordered by red, located at the lower right, overlapping the scene.

Visible Text: No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image shows an anime-style character holding chopsticks close to their mouth in an indoor, blue-toned setting. Red graphic elements, including an arrow and a circled smile icon, overlay the scene.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
